items.claim: Moving up to 170 pounds will make Conor McGregor less mobile.
items.quote: Is going to be more mobile or less mobile. I'm going to say less mobile.

items.claim: Moving up to 170 pounds will make Conor McGregor slower.
items.quote: Is he going to have better cardio or worse cardio? Is he going to be faster or slower maybe is the better way to say it. I think probably slower.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff.
items.quote: Five years out the game, coming back at 170

items.claim: Max Holloway's speed will be double that of Conor McGregor's.
items.quote: I think Max's speed is going to be double Conor McGregor's speed.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will begin to fatigue as the fight progresses against Max Holloway.
items.quote: And And Conor's going to try to stay with him, but he's just going to start to melt as this thing keeps going.

items.claim: Max Holloway is likely to finish Conor McGregor in nine out of ten matchups.
items.quote: I think nine times out of 10 here, Max is uh going to look real good and most of those Maxes finishing him, bro.

items.claim: Max Holloway is likely to finish Conor McGregor in the second or third round.
items.quote: I think second and third are live rounds for Holloway to put McGregor away.
